title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm out with Sakura Chiyono O...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wow, look at all those adorable plushies!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O points toward a claw machine
filled with Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It'd be so fun to have a bunch of these lined up in
my room! They'd really liven things up!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
The problem is, I don't know if I can win enough
of them... If I try my luck every day, maybe I'll
have enough by next year...
choice_data_list: I can win some for you.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: What? You'd do that? For me?
choice_data_list: Yup! Now it's your turn to cheer me on!
Yup! Now it's your turn to cheer me on!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Like they say, races come to those who wait. I
can't wait to see how many you get! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
